outcome: EVE UI now shows only recorded data or explicit missing-data states, and remaining controls route to concrete views or actions.

added.description: AI session cards show recorded provider/id, transcript availability, and the command for capturing transcript artifacts
EVE UI exposes config and raw JSON section anchors for action buttons

fixed.description: History and implementation views use actual EVE and Git dates instead of hardcoded relative labels
Detail cards no longer display dummy relationships, decisions, risks, branch state, or session journey data

verification.reference: npm run build; npm test; go test ./...; Playwright screenshot smoke test
